EXIT ? COO Klein's $71.95 alert level cleared. RKLB surged to $73.92 (+11.9% from yesterday close $66.07). Per plan: trim all at COO Klein sale level. Realized gain: +$25.88 (+9.59%). ATM dilution overhang + $1B offering risk = no reason to hold higher. Locked profit on trailer.

PARTIAL TRIM ? Pulled 2PM CT trim trigger early. Stock at $32.21, just $0.04 above day low $32.17. Accelerating fade. Sold 5 of 10 shares. Realized gain: +$2.33 (+1.46%). Keeping 5-share runner with hard stop $31.00.

strategy.cashReserve: 20-30% minimum ($2,000-$3,000) ? dry powder for pullbacks and new setups
strategy.tradingFrequency: Low ? 1 to 3 trades per week max. No churning.
strategy.stopPolicy: Hard stops on every position. A 10% loss on a $1,000 position = $100 hit, ~1% of portfolio. Acceptable. A 30% loss without a stop is not.
strategy.entryDiscipline: No chasing. Enter on pullbacks to support or confirmed breakouts with volume. Setup must be clear before entry.
